productDisplayName: Nike Women White Sweet Classic Leather Shoes
description: Style Note This vintage style nike Sweet Classic Leather shoe is a perfect fusion of street fashion and tennis glam. Designed for the tennis lover but crafted to look great on everybody these shoes blend function and fashion effortlessly, to make you look fabulous on and off the court. Product Details Synthetic leather upper with nike swoosh overlays on the midfoot  Mildly padded collar with an embroidered logo on the back Lacing system for a snug, cutomised Fit and a padded tongue for comfort Synthetic leather and mesh fabric lining for comfort and breathability EVA midsole for advanced cushioning Herringbone grooves on the durable outsole for enhanced grip and traction Leaf patterened herringbone grooves on the forefoot for better grip during toe off Material and Care Mesh Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
